content.en:
"Where is this?"

The Dragon's Tooth Heavenly Ancestor had no idea where he was.

The Shock Stream Vortex has a teleportation effect, so he may be infinitely far away from the Wanlong territorial waters now, and may not even be able to return to it forever.

Thinking of this, the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor was in a very bad mood.

Soon, he found himself in an unknown place, as if it was the center of the convergence of the shock current vortex, and he wanted to get out of here, but his strength was not enough, and he was thrown over again as soon as he shuttled out.

"No, unless my strength can break through again, maybe I can hope to leave this unknown place!"

Unable to leave, the Dragon's Tooth Ancestor began to explore the place.

Soon, he discovered other Blood Transformation Realm creatures, and their strength was even more terrifying than him.

"A lot of blood mutant creatures!"

The Dragon's Tooth Heavenly Ancestor trembled.

Fortunately, the Blood Transformation Realm creatures did not attack him here, it is estimated that he has been trapped here for countless years, and there is no way to leave, so he wants to have one more Blood Transformation Realm to accompany him.

"There's a cultivator here!"

The creatures of the first four blood transformation realms and the fifth blood transformation realm stared at the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor one after another.

"Hello everyone!"

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor greeted.

"If it's in the outside world, a three-time Blood Transformation Realm cultivator like you, I'll eat it in one bite!" said a five-time Blood Transformation Realm creature coldly.

"Yes, yes, yes!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor didn't dare to refute.

Later, he chatted with these Blood Transformation Realm creatures, and then he learned that they had been trapped here for countless years, and that there was only one Blood Transformation Realm creature when they came in, and now it had become five Blood Transformation Realms.

But even if he became a blood transformation realm five times, he still couldn't get out of here.

"I haven't left the Blood Transformation Realm five times!"

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor was stunned, didn't this mean that he would never be able to get out.

"Didn't you call for help?" asked the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor.

A five-time Blood Transformation Realm creature said: "We don't know the powerful Blood Transformation Realm creatures, who do we ask for help? Moreover, this is the place of the death vortex, unless the Seven Blood Transformation Realm creatures come in to save us, they can't get out! How can the Seven Blood Transformation Realm creatures come here to save us?"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor was right to think about it, how rare were the creatures of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm, how could they come to rescue him?

"Let's go, take you to see and see good things!"

These Blood Transformation Realm creatures brought the Dragontooth Heavenly Ancestor to the center of the Death Vortex.

Here, the Dragon's Tooth Ancestor saw a piece of wood and a golden leaf.

"What is this?"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor asked.

"I don't know!" a Blood Transformation Realm creature pointed to the golden leaf and said, "This records the Ancient Technique, but what the Ancient Technique is, we don't know, we can't practice it anyway." As for this piece of wood, it should be a fragment of some kind of tree, and every few years a drop of golden material flows out, and this golden substance can improve our strength. If it weren't for it, our cultivation wouldn't have improved so quickly. The next time the golden substance flows out, I will also use a little bit for you to enhance your strength. We can't rely on the strong people in the outside world, so we can only cultivate a seven-time blood transformation realm here, so that we can hope to get out!"

"Why don't you break this piece of wood that flows out of gold?"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor asked.

"Nonsense, if it can be broken, do you still need to remind you?"

The five-time Blood Transformation Realm creature sneered.

The dragon's tooth understood, even five Blood Transformation Realm creatures couldn't shake this piece of wood, its texture was too strong, I was afraid that it would take six Blood Transformation Realm or even seven Blood Transformation Realm creatures to have any hope of breaking it.

Subsequently, he went to comprehend the primeval technique, and the comprehension did not end for a long time.

Moreover, once this primeval technique fails to cultivate once, the physical body will be damaged.

Moreover, he did not copy the primeval golden blood of cultivation.

Useless!

"No, it can't go on like this, this group of Blood Transformation Realm creatures don't know how long they've been cultivating here, and they still can't break through to the Seven Blood Transformation Realm, and they probably know that they have no hope of breaking through, so they pin their hopes on other Blood Transformation Realms. "

Dragontooth didn't want to pin his hopes on other Blood Transformation Realm creatures, he had to find a way to get out!

"Maybe you can contact the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor must be very well mixed in the territorial sea boundary, maybe he knows the creatures of the Blood Transformation Realm seven times. This piece of wood and the primeval technique may be able to impress the creatures of the Seven Blood Transformation Realms, so as to rescue us. "

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor thought so.

So, he desperately practiced the Endless Heavenly Ancestor.

But he didn't know the location of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, and he didn't know if the Endless Heavenly Ancestor could receive the message, so he could only keep sending it out.

Coupled with the fact that the fluctuation of the transmission was very weak, the probability of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor receiving the information was not too high.

But after countless years, if you keep trying, there may be hope!

The years passed.

A long time has passed, and the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor has sent messages again and again, but every time there is no response, it is too far away.

......

this day.

A replica body of Ye Tian was ready to return to Wanlong's territorial waters and bring back some resources.

On the way back, he suddenly sensed a teleportation message from the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor.

"Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian sensed it carefully, and the message was intermittent, as if it was coming from an unknown place.

And in the midst of this fragmented information, he seemed to sense the name of the primeval art.

Suddenly, he was curious!

So, he followed the message and kept getting closer to the other party's position.

Finally, after a long distance, the message was clear.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, I am trapped in the Land of the Death Vortex, here I have a leaf, the leaf has the Ancient Technique, and a piece of wood that cannot be destroyed even five times in the Blood Transformation Realm, and the wood can also flow out of golden substance, which can improve the cultivation of the Blood Transformation Realm. Please also find a seven-time blood transformation realm to help me get out of trouble, these things are the reward!"

Hearing this message, Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

"Ancient Gold Leaf, can the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor still find this thing?"

He didn't believe that the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor would lie to him, because with the strength of the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, he didn't even have the qualifications to remove the name Ancient Golden Leaf.

Therefore, it can only be true!

"Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, your specific location, position it for me!"

Ye Tian said.

Land of the Death Spiral.

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor received a summons from the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, and there seemed to be a drama in his words, and he was immediately excited.

Of course, he didn't tell the other Blood Transformation Realm creatures, but immediately sent the location of this place to Ye Tian with his own coordinates.
